name: open-webui
title: Open WebUI + Ollama
description: ChatGPT-style interface for local LLMs. Run AI models entirely on your hardware — no cloud, no API keys, complete privacy. Supports Ollama, OpenAI API, RAG, voice, and vision.

variables.name: PORT_OPEN_WEBUI
variables.label: Host Port
variables.description: Port to expose Open WebUI on
